deltas.releaseNoteText: [**Comments**]: Added `CommentService.selectCommentByAnnotationId(annotationId?: string)` to programmatically select a comment bubble, or clear the selection when called with no argument. Useful for deep links, reply notifications, or synced cursors.
deltas.summary: Update selectCommentByAnnotationId documentation to show the optional parameter and clarify that calling it with no argument (or an invalid ID) clears the current selection

parameters.name: annotationId
parameters.description: ID of the annotation to select. Omit or pass an invalid ID to clear the current selection.

skipped.releaseNoteText: [**All Components**]: `injectCustomCss()` / `client.injectCustomCss()` now reliably reaches all shadow-root components on first paint and subsequent calls.
skipped.reason: Bug fix — reliability improvement with no API or behavior change. Does not qualify per policy.

skipped.releaseNoteText: [**Comments**]: In sidebar focused-thread mode, clicking a second annotation bubble now immediately shows the correct thread instead of the stale previous one.
skipped.reason: Bug fix — no API or behavior change.

skipped.releaseNoteText: [**Comments**]: Clicking the @ mention button while editing a comment no longer throws a null dereference.
skipped.reason: Bug fix — no API or behavior change.

skipped.releaseNoteText: [**Comments**]: The options dropdown (Edit / Delete) now hides while a comment is being edited.
skipped.reason: Bug fix — no API or behavior change.

skipped.releaseNoteText: [**Comments**]: The unread icon on `velt-sidebar-button-unread-icon` is now driven strictly by `unreadCount > 0`, even when a wireframe template is supplied.
skipped.reason: Bug fix — no API or behavior change.
